001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo;
002
003import androidx.room.Embedded;
004import androidx.room.Relation;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Egg;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.EggGroup;
007import java.util.List;
008
009
010/**
011 * Room relation object combining an egg group with its associated eggs.
012 */
013public class EggGroupWithEggs {
014
015  @Embedded
016  private EggGroup eggGroup;
017
018  @Relation(
019      parentColumn = "egg_group_id",
020      entityColumn = "egg_group_id"
021  )
022
023  private List<Egg> eggs;
024
025  /**
026   * Gets the egg group.
027   *
028   * @return the egg group
029   */
030  public EggGroup getEggGroup() {
031    return eggGroup;
032  }
033
034  /**
035   * Sets the egg group.
036   *
037   * @param eggGroup the egg group to set
038   */
039  public void setEggGroup(EggGroup eggGroup) {
040    this.eggGroup = eggGroup;
041  }
042
043  /**
044   * Gets the list of eggs in this group.
045   *
046   * @return the list of eggs
047   */
048  public List<Egg> getEggs() {
049    return eggs;
050  }
051
052  /**
053   * Sets the list of eggs in this group.
054   *
055   * @param eggs the list of eggs to set
056   */
057  public void setEggs(List<Egg> eggs) {
058    this.eggs = eggs;
059  }
060}
